mapper.select: select action_id, request_id, request_no, step_index, step_code, step_name, action_type, action_result, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_name, reviewer_role, assignment_type, comment_text, data_snapshot_json, create_time, remark from sc_affair_action where request_id = #{requestId} order by create_time asc, action_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sc_affair_action (request_id, request_no, step_index, step_code, step_name, action_type, action_result, reviewer_user_id, reviewer_name, reviewer_role, assignment_type, comment_text, data_snapshot_json, create_time, remark) values (#{requestId}, #{requestNo}, #{stepIndex}, #{stepCode}, #{stepName}, #{actionType}, #{actionResult}, #{reviewerUserId}, #{reviewerName}, #{reviewerRole}, #{assignmentType}, #{commentText}, #{dataSnapshotJson}, sysdate(), #{remark})
